headline: Q4 Rundown: HP (NYSE:HPQ) Vs Other Hardware & Infrastructure Stocks
summary: As the Q4 earnings season wraps, let’s dig into this quarter’s best and worst performers in the hardware & infrastructure industry, including HP (NYSE:HPQ) and its peers.
